goal: Implement Safe Live Save Mode: live runtime preview for real-time changes, one config write for persistence, and explicit runtime control of misc:disable_autoreload so saves never trigger accidental reload loops.
currentDisableAutoreloadValue: false (Hyprland default; the app restores this after every proof)
safeLiveSaveModeStatus: implemented; Inactive at rest on this system (autoreload active), Enable button live and proven
runtimeAutoreloadSetProofStatus: PROVEN: misc:disable_autoreload set true and reverted false at runtime with getoption verification; no file written
configWriteReloadAvoidanceProofStatus: PROVEN: with the runtime flag true, the active-config pilot wrote and byte-exactly restored hyprland.conf while the flag stayed true throughout (a reload would have reset it to the config's false); config SHA-256 identical before and after
activeConfigPilotGateStatus: PASSED THIS SPRINT: all fifteen gates passed with live-collected autoreload evidence; the pilot wrote one inert record, verified via parser/projection, restored the original bytes, and verified restoration
activeConfigWrittenDetail: once, by the designed gated pilot, with pre-write backup and hash; immediately restored
runtimeMutationRan: only env-gated proofs that applied and reverted with zero residue (autoreload flag round trip; pilot write+restore; family record round trips)
uiSurfaces: Safe Live Save Mode card: status badge with live misc:disable_autoreload value, blocked reason, explanation, live Enable/Disable buttons routing through the module's fixed constant commands with readback verification
enabling at runtime touches no file and needs no reload; persisting the setting to config is documented as a separate step

mode.enable: runtime-only via hl.config misc.disable_autoreload=true (module constant, verified)
mode.saveGate: open only while the runtime value reads true; fails closed on unreadable state

nextRecommendedWork: optional: persist misc:disable_autoreload=true via the gated scalar save so the mode survives restarts
saveGateIntegration: require_safe_live_save_mode now gates every Save path: both scalar UI saves (gated_scalar_save_live) and structured-family saves (gated_family_save)
